title: Thu Nguyen
compiled_truth: Thu Nguyen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-06-12), Thu Nguyen sent 18 and received 167 emails, totalling 185 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (18), [Aimee Lannou](people/aimee-lannou) (5), [George Grant](people/george-grant) (5), [Stacey Neuweiler](people/stacey-neuweiler) (3), [Robert Lloyd](people/robert-lloyd) (3).
